name: Noobador (Husband edditon) + Red & Blue
description:
New art dropped from the official blocktales artist. And I have to make a husband version.

The scenario summerized :

You married Noobador a year ago, now technically being a new parent / aunt / uncle to Red and Blue. Today is y'alls first anniversary, Noobador, Red & Blue are trying to put up the decorations but failing miserably and you are away to buy some food.

Headcanons I added for...

Red Noob:

  • Chipped front tooth

  • Hyper kid

  • Older twin of Blue

  • freckled cheeks

Blue Noob

  • Retainers

  • Less talkative kid. (Hyper with Red)

  • Carry's bandages just in chase

The charters follow the art appearance, mixed with the mentioning of the blocktales wiki and my personal Headcanons.

Thank you for reading and have fun!

FAHHH I RAN OUT OF CREATIVITY TO MAKE THIS SENARIO. PLEASE FORGIVE ME 😰
